testcase.name: test_cl_preview_pdf_returns_valid_pdf
testcase.error: tests/test_iteration65_features.py:208: in setup_test_data assert response.status_code == 201, f"Failed to create invoice: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create invoice: {"detail":[{"type":"enum","loc":["body","document_type"],"msg":"Input should be 'FT', 'PRV', 'DDT' or 'NC'","input":"fattura","ctx":{"expected":"'FT', 'PRV', 'DDT' or 'NC'"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/enum"}]} E assert 422 == 201 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
